messages.message: Italy has no interest in conflict with Austria. We could cooperate in the Balkans if you refrain from pushing into our sphere near Venice or Trieste.

Hi Germany! Would you be interested in cooperating to stop the western juggernaut that so frequently dominates the game? I think that our two nations make natural allies given our central positioning and how our forces can move outward from one another without being a threat to each other!
Italy is focused on securing southern Europe. We could be allies if you don’t threaten our expansion along the Mediterranean coast.

Hey Russia! I reckon we can do a lot more together than against one another, and working together is by far my favourite option when playing Turkey.

Would you be down for a bit of a classic juggernaut?
Hey France! I know we have to figure out the channel but I think it might be beneficial if we agree not to go there. What are your thoughts?
Hi Austria! France and Austria make natural allies as we share neighbors in Italy and Germany. What are your thoughts on working together?
Greetings Russia! I hope we can have a beneficial relationship in the north. Are there any territories in Scandinavia you'd prefer I not have my army in?
Hello France! Working together sounds great! I'm happy to share any information that comes my way that may be useful to you as well. Good luck in the West.
Hey Germany! I'm hoping we can have a good relationship. Any way you want to negotiate for Belgium?

Hey Turkey! I could not agree more. I love the Juggernaut and think it's one of the strongest alliances in the game when properly executed. So what do you suggest? If we're going to do that, I think we should leave the Black Sea empty and work towards getting you that second build from Bul ASAP so we can then expand together with all speed.
I hope you understand if I'm a bit suspicious of an offer like that, especially given that your moveset is already in.
I would very much like that. Austria and Italy never seem to get very far on this map unless they work together.

Guten tag Germany!
What would you say to working together? If the central powers stick together, we have a better chance at a strong finish.

Hello England! I'd prefer if you took Norway with a fleet. A Russian army in Norway is very disconcerting!
I would, of course, be delighted if you're willing to limit your involvement in Scandinavia to only Norway. I would like to work with you long-term if you're interested. Have you heard from the other powers yet?
Hi Italy! That sounds good to me. I have much bigger threats in England and Germany. What do you think?

Hey France,
I think that sounds like a really good idea. You'll agree to a DMZ in Bur?
Hello Turkey! What do you think about working together against Russia?

Hey France! What's up? I think we can form a great alliance because it's not easy for us to stab each other. I hope we can work together long-term. Have you heard from the other powers yet?
England asked me if I had any territories in Scandinavia I'd prefer he not land an army in. I just wanted to let you know in case you think he might be going for Belgium.

Hey Austria! What's up? Have you heard from the other powers yet?
How do you think we should split up the Balkans? I have a feeling Turkey will try to claim Bul, but Gre is much more important for you to take. I would like to take Rum so that we can limit Turkish expansion early on. Let me know what you think.
Have you heard from the other powers yet?
Hello England! Since we share a neighbor in Russia, I would like to open the communications to a possible future alliance. Good luck in the West!

Hey England,
How do you want to negotiate for Belgium? I'm happy to work with you, what are you thinking?
Hi England! That sounds great to me! I'm happy to DMZ the channel
Sure!

Hey Italy! What's up? Have you heard from the other powers yet?
I think Italy-russia can be a very productive alliance that can last for quite some time. Have you heard from the other powers yet?
Alright, sounds good.

I have heard from everyone except for Turkey and Germany. Since Turkey is the biggest threat to both of us, I think it's smart to take him out first. I agree with your plan to limit Turkish expansion, especially since Italy has contacted me and seems peaceful. If we can limit Turkey to only one build (Bul), then that's really strong for both of us.

I have yet to decide how I'll move with my fleet in Trieste. That's probably going to be the biggest deciding factor. I would also like to see if you're open to moving your fleet to Rumania in the fall.
Sounds good! Same to you!
My immediate thought is I'd like to get an army into Belgium. From there I can support myself into the channel and convoy the army to the continent next year. What do you think?

Hey Russia! I agree that I need to get my fleet out of the black sea, and I'd love to move it west as soon as I'm able.

And your move set is very fine, that's precisely the opening that I've planned, haha.

I hope you're satisfied with my moves so far :)
Would you be willing to work together on England?
Hi Austria! I'd be down for that!
Good luck to you too!
Sounds good to me.
Hello Turkey! I know that we're pretty far from one another, but that doesn't mean we can't work together! I'd be happy to share information that comes my way that might help you in your endeavors
Definitely. I'm going to move to Holland to start, then build another fleet in Kiel to help against England?

I could move my fleet to Rum, but I'll need to move my army from War to Ukr for that. Turkey wants to move his fleet to Con, and I plan on going for Bla in order to either bounce him or take it in the fall. That would leave Rum open for me to move there in the fall, though. Would you be comfortable with that?
Sounds good. Any thoughts on Belgium?
Hey France! Sounds good, I'm happy to do the same. Good luck!
Are you planning to move on burgundy this turn?

Hey Austria,
I'm definitely happy to work together, especially in regards to our other neighbours. We don't want to get too wrapped up in our northern borders.
Are you going to try and work with either Russia or Turkey? I'm currently talking to France, but I'd also be interested in taking on England, or at least preventing them from getting Belgium.
Great! How would you like to proceed?
Or would you rather see what France does?
If you're willing to cede it to me I'd be happy to ally with you against Germany

Hey Russia,
What are you thinking regarding the Baltic? I would be happy to work with you to keep England out of the region, and maybe even form a full on alliance against them?
Same to you!
The Balkans are contested, but Italy respects Turkish holdings farther east. Perhaps we could avoid direct conflict and even coordinate against Austria’s ambitions.
Nah, I'm going to go for Holland, maybe move to Ruhr depending on what happens this turn.
Sounds good to me! I'll be playing it safe the first few rounds and try not to engage in any fights until I have to.
Agreed. I plan to only take Norway with a fleet. And I think it would be very beneficial to work together. I haven't heard too much from the others, you?

Hey Turkey,
Although we don't share a border, I would be happy to work with you to keep Russia in check. What do you say?
They seem great! I'll do Sev-rum, Mos-ukr and War-gal. I'm excited about the Juggernaut!
Sounds like a plan!
Ok sounds good
I've heard from Austria and Turkey. No one else as of yet!
Yes, as long as we keep Gal as a DMZ.
I'd be willing to let you have most/all of the German Sc's and I'd take Belgium, Ruhr, and Munich

Hey Germany! I'm sorry I haven't gotten back to you yet, I was a little busy today. I'd be happy to leave the Baltic region empty. Have you heard from the other powers yet?
I'm always on the lookout for ways to work together in Scandinavia and the northern seas. What do you propose we do? I was thinking you could take Den, I take Swe, and then we support each other into Nwy and Den respectively?
Also, have you heard from the other powers yet? I haven't heard much from anyone except England and Turkey.
I think it would be beneficial to work together long term. Have you heard from Russia?
Great.

I'm going for Bulgaria and Black Sea. Perhaps move an army to Galicia?

I'll be mostly passive the first few rounds, going for the safe route.
Sounds good to me. I think a DMZ in Gal would be great for both of us. I hope I can count on you to not move to Gal as well!
Hi Russia! I haven't heard much from the other powers yet, but I'd be happy to work together!
Do you have a different suggestion?

Sounds good to me.
I've heard from France, who seems pretty friendly so far. Not sure what their intentions are.
Hey Germany! Sounds good. I'll be mostly passive the first few rounds, playing it safe
I would prefer that we split Belgium and Holland. That would make it a lot easier for me to actually make progress against Germany.
Hey England! We're on opposite corners of the board, so I don't think we have a lot to discuss for now. But I'll be happy to pass on anything interesting that I hear from the other side of the map.
And likewise!
Sounds good to me. I think a DMZ in Gal would be great for both of us. I hope I can count on you not to move there as well!
I would be happy to help you out against England as well. Have you heard from Russia at all? He's being very vague with me...

I agree—England and Germany are far more immediate threats to France. Let’s keep our focus on securing southern Europe and the Mediterranean. If you ever need support against Austria or Germany, I’d be happy to help.
That works for me!
Sounds good! I'll be moving my fleet to Con, so that I can get it to the Mediterranean as soon as I'm able.
Hey Turkey! Sounds great to me. It's always good to keep communication open.
Awesome! So what are your plans for this turn? I was thinking I'd go for Swe and Rum and I'd definitely like to limit England to Nwy. Have you heard anything from the other powers yet?
Yes I have. He seems nice enough, but I've heard from others that he's gunning for me. I think we should team up to take him out early.
I've heard from Austria and Turkey as well. Turkey seems to think you're gunning for him.
Would you be willing to support me into Belgium?
Hello Russia! I’m still in the early game, focusing on securing my Mediterranean foothold. I’m open to an alliance, especially if we can coordinate against Austria or Turkey later on.
How is your relationship with Germany? If I can get him to help me against Russia, then that should make it a little easier for you to control Scandanavia.
Anything you want to share about your plans?
Ok. Let me know if you want to try something.
Do you know if Russia plans to move Moscow north?
I'll go for Belgium and I'd be happy to ally with you against England if you're up for it
I also heard from France, and he seems open to moving against England together.
I have talked to them a bit. Turkey seems a little more friendly, but not sure if that's a good or bad sign?
That’s wise—early engagement can be risky. Let’s keep the Balkans relatively peaceful for now. If Austria starts to push too hard, maybe we can work together to contain them.
Yeah, that sounds great! Are you going for Bul in the spring or are you going to try to block Austria out of Gre?
I think it's pretty good with Germany. He said he's moving to Ruhr so he might be moving Munich to burgundy.
Yeah, that's what they've said to me as well. I'm definitely happy with that.
Sounds good! Best of luck
Perfect, that sounds like a plan
Sure, I'm happy to do that.
Will do
France seems like they're going to try and go for Belgium, I guess we'll see what happens.
Agreed—let’s keep the Balkans calm for now. If Austria moves aggressively toward Trieste or Venice, I’ll let you know so we can coordinate a response.
I am! I'm going to try to take Nwy this year, so that would certainly help us both.
What do you think about Turkey?
Great!
Cool.
I'll be going for Bulgaria, and depending on how things go I'll move my fleet to Aegean or Greece. I think I have a chance to take Greece
France, I appreciate your support. If Germany starts expanding into the Rhineland or Austria begins moving toward your borders, I’d be happy to assist in any way I can.
Turkey has been brief with me. What about you?
All I know so far is that I'm going to try to take Sweden and work my way south from there.
It doesn't really seem like he's committed to an alliance with me...
Thank you!

Hey England! Unfortunately I don't know that for sure, I just got a response from him.

I think I can guess what his moves will be: Sev-rum, Mos-ukr, War-gal. So if he says he'll move Mos-stp, he's lying to me.
Germany told me that he's got no interest in attacking Russia. I don't know if that information is useful to you.
Alright. I'm going to set up my move to the channel then.
Sounds good.
He wants me to take you out with him.
Sounds good!
Ok sounds good.
Sounds good!
Oh, I didn't know that. I've only spoken to them a little bit. We'll see what happens this turn.
Ok.
Have you heard anything from Italy that might be of interest?
How does that work for you?
Well thanks anyway. And you're right about his moves.
What have you discussed with Russia?
Yep!
Austria mentioned that you want to work with him against me. Is that true?
I'll let you know when I get anything definite
We're agreed to leave the Baltic region empty, and possibly work together against England, although I'm not sure about their intentions. What are they saying to you?
What about you?
Sounds good to me!
He did, but I'm not interested in working with him at the moment.

Yes, he's told me that he has no interest in attacking me.

Nothing else, though.
Sounds good to me as well!
Same. The second he opens up against me, I'll help you take him down.
That's a shame. Thanks for the info!
That sounds good. What about Scandinavia? Are you willing to block him out of Sweden in the fall? I'm worried that he's trying to create some conflict between you and England.
Cool!
Will do. Have you heard from Austria?
Ok great, thanks
I think I'm going to move on France with Germany.
I'm going to open pretty defensively, just in case.
I would definitely be willing to do that. I can also try to prevent him from getting Belgium this turn.
You can take Rumania with your fleet. We'll just go after Turkey together.
Sounds good to me!
That sounds like a good idea!
Great!
I haven't!
Ok
Have you spoken with Turkey at all?
Yeah, same. So it goes!
Italy remains open to cooperation, Austria. If you wish to focus westward or northward, we can respect each other’s spheres and focus on our own growth.
Would you be open to moving your army to Sevastopol in the spring, and then in the fall convoying it to Bulgaria with support from Rumania?
Just as a hypothetical.
Yes. He seems open to working with me as well.
Have you heard much from Germany?
Yeah, me neither. I guess he's not very talkative, but that's rare even in non-anonymous games.
Do you think you'll try to ally with Germany or England?
Hey Italy! How are things looking down south?
Are you going to work with Italy against France?

Hey Italy,
How would you feel about working together against France?
That sounds good to me!
Yeah. What about you?
Russia, I’m still in the early phase of the game, but I’m keeping an eye on Turkey’s movements. If you ever feel threatened from the south, let me know—I’d be open to coordinating.
I haven't heard from Italy, I'll reach out and see what they think.
England, things are stable here in the Mediterranean! I’m focused on securing southern Europe and avoiding early conflicts. If you’re watching the Channel, I’m not a threat to your interests.
I might be open to that, but not this turn. I'd like to see how things work out before I commit to anything.

Thanks! I'll keep you updated. I think Turkey will take Bul, Austria is moving his fleet to Alb or Gre and his armies to Ser and Bud. He plans to keep Turkey out of Gre. Have you spoken with Austria about Gre?
Germany, cooperation sounds interesting—I’m open to it if France becomes a mutual concern. However, I’ll need to ensure my own expansion along the Mediterranean isn’t restricted.
Honestly I'm not sure yet
Which way are you thinking about going?
Austria, I appreciate your openness. Let’s keep Trieste and Venice as neutral ground. If you head west or north, I’ll focus south and east.
I think I'm going to open pretty traditionally. Going to Norwegian Sea, North Sea, and Yorkshire.
Germany, a partnership against France could be mutually beneficial, provided it doesn't restrict my southern Mediterranean ambitions. I’d be interested in coordinating if you have specific plans.
I asked him about his intentions, and he responded that he wanted to focus east or west, which I would take as a sign that he's going after France. I will let you know if he lets me know more.
Alright, sounds good to me. I guess we'll see how things go this turn, but I'm definitely open to working with you.
I am very interested in working with you and Italy. I have seen a lot of success with that kind of alliance.
Have you heard anything interesting from the other players? Italy and Germany are the only two who've said much, besides you
Alright, keep me updated
Sounds good. Well we'll have to see what happens after the first couple turns.
Austria, I'm glad we're aligned. Regarding Greece, I haven’t spoken about it yet, but I’d prefer to keep the Balkans stable and avoid unnecessary conflict. If you want to coordinate, let me know.
Ok, I've spoken to them a bit more and they seem friendly so far. Not sure what they're planning though.
Russia, I appreciate the update. I haven’t spoken with Austria about Greece yet, but I’ll keep your concerns in mind. If Austria moves aggressively toward Greek territories, I’ll let you know.
Still thinking. Have you heard anything from Italy?
Turkey, I’d like to reaffirm our mutual understanding about the Balkans. If Austria moves toward Greece or the Adriatic, let’s coordinate to ensure stability in the region.
Have you heard anything from Austria?

I've heard from everyone except France. Italy seems friendly, I asked him about his plans in the Mediterranean. I think he's going for Tun. Germany and I seem friendly, although I'm not sure what to make of his move to Den.

I haven’t spoken with Austria about Greece directly, but I’ve made it clear that Italy intends to keep the Balkans stable and avoid unnecessary conflict. If Austria moves aggressively toward Greek territories or the Adriatic, I’ll let you know immediately so we can coordinate.
I appreciate the update! I think Italy and I are on the same page.
Yeah, we've been talking, he seems pretty friendly.
Not much. They said that they don't intend to expand my way
Yeah, I'd say it's very unlikely that he'll move to Den.
They said you two had talked about working together?

Italy remains committed to keeping Trieste and Venice neutral ground. If you are moving toward Greece or the Adriatic, I’d appreciate being informed ahead of time so we can maintain stability in the region.
If Austria pushes toward Greek territories or tries to expand into the Adriatic, let me know—I’d be happy to coordinate with you to counter any aggression.
I'm planning to move my fleet to Albania. I think that would be better for both of us.
Italy remains focused on securing southern Europe and the Mediterranean. If Germany or Austria becomes active, I’ll support France as an ally.
How are your relations with France? Have you been able to coordinate with him?

Moving your fleet to Albania is a reasonable step, but I hope you’ll keep Trieste and Venice unthreatened. If you’re planning further into the Balkans, I’d appreciate a heads-up so we can avoid conflict.
Ok, good to hear.
I appreciate your openness to cooperation. If France becomes a mutual concern later, I’d be happy to coordinate. For now, I’ll focus on securing southern Europe.
Agreed—things seem stable for now. I’m keeping my focus on the Mediterranean and southern Europe, so we should have no issues.
Sounds good! I look forward to working together!
Austria is shifting toward Albania, and I want to reaffirm our mutual understanding: if they press further into the Balkans or Adriatic, let’s coordinate to maintain stability.
Ok. Good luck in the south.

Moving your fleet to Albania makes sense, but I hope you’ll keep Trieste and Venice unthreatened. If you're planning further into the Balkans, I’d appreciate a heads-up so we can avoid conflict and maintain stability in the region.
Austria is shifting toward Albania. Let’s reaffirm our mutual understanding—should they press further into the Balkans or Adriatic, we’ll coordinate to maintain stability.
France, I look forward to working together. If Germany or Austria becomes a concern, I’ll support your interests in southern Europe.
Not as much as I would have liked.
Germany, cooperation sounds interesting—if France becomes a mutual concern later, I’d be happy to coordinate. For now, I’ll focus on securing southern Europe.
Sounds good! I'd appreciate any information you have about England and Germany that you'd be willing to share!

France, I'm glad to hear you're looking forward to cooperation! As for England and Germany, they seem to be maintaining a cautious stance for now. I'll keep an eye on their movements and pass along any relevant updates if I notice anything that could concern you.
Good to hear.
Do you know what France plans to do?
Thank you! I'll do the same!
Hey England! Looks like Germany's going to contest Bel.
I might be open to that, but not this turn. I'd like to see how things work out defensively before I commit.
Great turn! What are your thoughts for this year?
Sounds good to me. I think Austria and Turkey are working together, so it might be helpful for us to do the same.
I think it makes sense for me to take Rum this turn, as we can work on pushing into Austria together next year. Do you think you'll try for Gre or Ser?
Can you support me into Bulgaria this turn? That would set us up to take the Turkish mainland in the next few years.
I'd be happy to support you into Munich if you'd like
It looks that way. You're going for Sweden I assume?
Next year
You can move to the black sea again with your fleet.
Nice work getting the channel!

Italy remains committed to maintaining stability along Trieste and Venice. If your fleet or armies are moving toward Albania or further into the Balkans, I'd appreciate being informed ahead of time to avoid any accidental conflict.
If Austria continues to move into the Balkans or Adriatic, please don't hesitate to reach out. Italy is ready to coordinate with Turkey to ensure our mutual interests remain protected.
You want to try and bounce Germany out of Belgium?
I think that could be really good for us. If we do that you're almost guaranteed Belgium.
Sounds good! I'll let you know if I hear anything.
I'm more focused on securing the Balkans and Mediterranean than Munich. However, if your ambitions head toward the Rhineland or northern Italy, we should coordinate to avoid overlapping interests.
Are you still interested in taking down Russia?
Italy is preparing to move toward Albania in Fall 1901. If you'd prefer to avoid a direct confrontation, let's discuss how we might share influence in the region.
Austria is moving aggressively toward Albania. If Turkey remains neutral, I may claim it outright. Let's discuss coordination to deter Austrian expansion into the Balkans.
What's your situation with Turkey and Italy?
I'm open to your suggestion. What do you have in mind?
I would appreciate your support into Belgium. I'll help you into Holland next year
Turkey and I have an agreement. What's your status with Italy?
Yep! And you're going for Den?

Italy proposes a non-aggression agreement regarding Albania and Trieste. If Austria moves into Albania, I will not oppose it outright, but I will expect a gesture of mutual respect—perhaps a shared occupation or a future negotiation on Trieste. Let’s avoid conflict for now.
Sounds good. Best of luck in the Balkans!

Austria’s aggression in the Balkans grows. If Turkey is willing, we could coordinate a quiet understanding to deter Austrian expansion. A mutual focus on Albania could benefit both our positions. Let’s discuss further.

Italy intends to strengthen its naval presence in the western Mediterranean. If France has no immediate interest in southern waters, we could maintain peace and focus our efforts elsewhere. I suggest we keep communication open.

Italy proposes a non-aggression agreement regarding Albania and Trieste. If Austria moves into Albania, I will not oppose it outright, but I will expect a gesture of mutual respect—perhaps a shared occupation or a future negotiation on Trieste. Let’s avoid conflict for now.
I'd be open to supporting you into Rumania this turn, if you're interested.

Yeah, go ahead for Rum, that's fine.

I think I'll move my army to Greece, it's pretty unlikely Austria will bounce me there.
Austria has been very quiet towards me, so I don't have any information for you.
Would you be able to support Burgundy into Belgium?

Austria’s aggression in the Balkans grows. If Turkey is willing, we could coordinate a quiet understanding to deter Austrian expansion. A mutual focus on Albania could benefit both our positions. Let’s discuss further.
Also Austria said he'd be willing to support me into Rumania this turn, he said he'd be willing to support me from Sevastopol. He's probably lying to me, but just FYI.
Agreed.

Italy intends to strengthen its naval presence in the western Mediterranean. If France has no immediate interest in southern waters, we could maintain peace and focus our efforts elsewhere. I suggest we keep communication open.
Just let me know.
Austria has offered to support me into Rumania.

Italy appreciates your agreement to avoid conflict in Albania for now. In Fall 1901 Movement, I will attempt to push toward Albania, but I remain open to a coordinated or shared approach. Let us know if you wish to formalize a division of influence.
Will do!

Austria’s offer to support you into Rumania is concerning. If Turkey’s focus shifts eastward, Italy may see an opportunity to advance into the southern Balkans. Let’s keep lines open—perhaps we could deter Austria from overextending in both directions.
And I'm glad to hear that!
Sorry for not responding. I'm going to go for Greece this turn. But I'd be happy to work together in the future.

Italy intends to strengthen its naval presence in the western Mediterranean. If France has no immediate interest in southern waters, we could maintain peace and focus our efforts elsewhere. I suggest we keep communication open.
Thanks for letting me know!
Are you moving against Austria?
I'll be able to support you in next year. If you want you could try to bounce Germany this year?
I'm open to something if you have a specific proposal in mind.

No problem.

I'm thinking of moving my army to Greece instead, and moving my fleet to Con. This gives me a chance to build a fleet in Smy next year. Do you think it's worth it to try to bounce Austria in Serbia?

Italy proposes a conditional truce: If Austria takes Albania alone this turn, Italy will not challenge it and will remain neutral toward Trieste. In return, Austria must refrain from moving into Venice or threatening Italian holdings. Let us know if this is acceptable.
I don't think I'll be able to get Denmark.
Why did you keep refreshing the page?
I'd love to work with you, but I'm not sure if it's wise to give Turkey another SC. I might just try to get into the Black Sea and move Ukraine to Rum so that I can support you into Bul next year.

If Turkey wishes to hold Bulgaria or Rumania, Italy may consider a mutual non-aggression pact in the Balkans. Austria’s moves suggest it will overextend if we act carefully. Let’s discuss how we might support each other’s goals.
What about you?
Are you going to try to take Rumania? I can support you in.

Italy sees opportunity in the south and Balkans, not Germany’s front. If Germany wishes to focus on France, Italy will not interfere. However, if Austria becomes too strong, we may need to reconsider our positions.
What's your situation with Italy?
Ok. I accept.

Thank you for your acceptance. To formalize our understanding, Italy will hold back from moving directly into Albania this turn. Instead, I propose we maintain a balance: Italy will push toward the southern Balkans, while Austria can claim Albania unchallenged. In return, Austria must refrain from threatening Venice or moving aggressively toward Trieste. This is a working foundation—we can adapt as needed.

Austria’s focus on the Balkans remains a concern. If Turkey wishes to consolidate its hold on Bulgaria or Rumania, Italy may be willing to support Turkey’s eastern ambitions in exchange for a mutual non-aggression pact in the south. Austria’s overreach could create instability—let’s coordinate to avoid it.
I'd say go for it. If Austria gets three builds we'll be in a lot of trouble. If you bounce, then he can't build another fleet in Tri, which is definitely better for us.
I would like to expand our non-aggression agreement to a more formal alliance. What do you think?

Italy remains focused on securing the Mediterranean and southern Balkans. If France’s ambitions remain northward, we may have no reason to conflict. However, if France seeks to expand southward, Italy will need to act decisively. Let’s keep communication open.
We're staying out of each other's way for now.
Ok. That works for me.
Sounds good to me!
Why?

Italy accepts your proposal to expand our non-aggression agreement into a formal alliance, provided it remains conditional and flexible. For now, I suggest we share influence in Albania and maintain mutual respect along Venice and Trieste. Italy will not oppose your claim to Albania this turn, but I expect Austria to remain neutral toward Venetian interests in return.
What are your plans for your other units?
I'm planning on moving my army to Greece, so I'd appreciate your support
I'd appreciate it, but it seems more likely that I'd bounce
Are you happy with the way that things have played out? I would like to continue working together if possible.
I'll have to pass, I'm afraid.
Ok. Just let me know.
Hopefully move to Greece and get a fleet build.

I apologize for the page refresh—technical error. Italy remains focused on southern expansion and will prioritize the Mediterranean and Balkans. If France’s ambitions remain northward, we may avoid conflict. However, if you seek southern expansion, please let me know early to prevent unnecessary friction.
Ok, sounds good. Good luck with Austria.
I'm going to move Ukraine to Rum, so if you'd like to support that unit in, that would be great!

Austria’s growing aggression in the Balkans remains a concern. If Turkey wishes to secure Bulgaria or Rumania, Italy may be willing to support your eastern ambitions in exchange for a mutual non-aggression pact in the south. Let’s discuss how we might deter Austrian overreach together.
I'm moving to Greece with my army.

Moving to Greece is a wise step, but Austria remains a shared concern. If Turkey consolidates in Greece and Bulgaria, Italy could support your flank while securing southern Albania or Apulia. Let’s coordinate—perhaps we could deter Austria from overextending.
I don't want to cause friction, but I see a ton of copy-paste messages. I just want you to know that I got your last message 3 times
I've already established that I'm moving to Greece, so I'm not sure what you mean

Italy acknowledges your claim to Albania. In return, we expect Austria to remain neutral toward Venice and Trieste. Let’s maintain our conditional alliance—Italy will push toward Apulia or Bulgaria while you focus northward.
No. I'm planning to move Serbia to Bulgaria.
Yeah, I'm happy with the way things went this year. What are your plans for this turn? I'm going for Swe, obviously.
But I'm glad that we're on the same page.
Italy intends to expand naval dominance in the western Mediterranean. If France plans to move southward, we must avoid conflict. Let’s keep communication open—mutual understanding benefits both.
Sounds good!
Agreed

If you're moving toward Greece, I suggest we coordinate to ensure Austria cannot pressure either of us from the north. A mutual understanding on the Balkan front would be wise. Perhaps we could support each other’s claims in Bulgaria or Albania if needed.
Thanks for your continued support

Italy acknowledges your claim to Albania and respects our conditional agreement. We suggest you remain focused northward while Italy secures the southern flank. Let’s continue this cooperation in Fall movement.
